5fda36b0-8432-4eb9-abc6-d7ba4c42dce6.response:
Functional Requirements:
- 21 Slot Assignment Bot must not modify slot lengths
- 11 Payment Handling Bot must collect customer card details
- 15 Quotation Logic Bot must fetch mileage using Google Maps API
- 13 Quotation Logic Bot must gather origin city from the customer
- 14 Quotation Logic Bot must gather destination city from the customer
- 23 Admin Requirements Bot must support purchase flow for retail subscriptions
- 20 Slot Assignment Bot must book slots exactly as they appear on the calendar
- 16 Quotation Logic Bot must produce a price quote using the company rate sheet
- 10 Long-Distance Moves Pricing must be computed using mileage and predefined rate sheets
- 24 Admin Requirements System must use client’s financial/card info for subscription purchases
- 7 Appointment Booking Bot must avoid booking on major holidays (Christmas, New Year’s Day, etc.)
- Holiday/Scheduling Bot must ensure availability for the entire load -> transport -> unload period
- 3 Appointment Booking If a date/time slot is available on the calendar, the bot must allow booking
- 17 Quotation Logic Bot must differentiate pricing for local, city-to-city, and long-distance moves
- 9 Long-Distance Moves Bot must calculate travel time/mileage using Google Maps between origin & destination
- 8 Long-Distance Moves Bot must verify multi-day consecutive availability (e.g., 5+ days for East Coast moves)
- # # Functional Area Functional Area Requirement Description Requirement Description 1 Appointment Booking Bot must check availability from a shared calendar
- 2 Appointment Booking Bot should only consider worker availability, not truck availability
- must be reserved only for short jobs

Non-Functional Requirements:
- 12 Payment Handling Bot must charge a $100 initial deposit at booking
- 19 Holiday/Scheduling Bot must ensure availability for the entire load -> transport -> unload period
- 10 Long-Distance Moves 9 Long-Distance Moves Bot must calculate travel time/mileage using Google Maps between origin & destination
- 26 Admin Requirements Demo delivery timeline expected Jan 1–5, 2026
- 22 Slot Assignment Bot ignores truck availability; only worker thresholds matter

User Requirements / Stories:
- 18 Holiday/Scheduling Bot must skip major holidays (full list needed from client)

System Requirements:
(none)

Business Requirements:
(none)

Features:
(none)
